description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic from Moshe ben Naʿim in Alexandria, to his father Me'ir ben Naʿim and to Se[nyor] David ben Naʿim in Cairo. The letter also contains blocks of Arabic text on the verso related to Moshe's employment in Alexandria mentioning the year 1239 AH which is 1823/24 CE. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic מאלכסנדריה לקהיר. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
